sections.name: Ilakni
sections.text: *Nethys Note: No description has been provided for this creature.*

traits.name: Unique
traits.text: A rules element with this trait is one-of-a-kind. The DC of Recall Knowledge checks related to creatures with this trait is increased by 10.

traits.name: Aberration
traits.text: Aberrations are creatures from beyond the planes or corruptions of the natural order.

traits.name: Humanoid
traits.text: Humanoid creatures reason and act much like humans. They typically stand upright and have two arms and two legs.

traits.name: Agile
traits.text: The multiple attack penalty you take with this weapon on the second attack on your turn is –4 instead of –5, and –8 instead of –10 on the third and subsequent attacks in the turn.

traits.name: Magical
traits.text: Something with the magical trait is imbued with magical energies not tied to a specific tradition of magic. Some items or effects are closely tied to a particular tradition of magic. In these cases, the item has the arcane, divine, occult, or primal trait instead of the magical trait. Any of these traits indicate that the item is magical.

traits.name: Reach
traits.text: This weapon can be used to attack enemies up to 10 feet away instead of only adjacent enemies. For creatures with reach, the weapon increases their reach by 5 feet.

traits.name: Occult
traits.text:
This magic comes from the occult tradition, calling upon bizarre and ephemeral mysteries. Anything with this trait is magical.  
  
A creature with this trait is primarily constituted of or has a strong connection to occult magic.

traits.name: Range
traits.text: These attacks will either list a finite range or a range increment, which follows the normal rules for range increments.

ability.name: Blackfrost Breath
ability.text: Ilakni breathes out a 60-foot cone of black wind. All creatures in the area take 10d6 cold damage (DC 30 basic Reflex save); a creature that fails the save is also exposed to blackfrost. Ilakni can't use Blackfrost Breath again for 1d4 rounds.

ability.name: Blackfrost Ice Shard
ability.text: A creature struck by Ilakni's blackfrost ice shard is exposed to blackfrost.

universal_monster_ability.name: Constrict
universal_monster_ability.text: The monster deals the listed amount of damage to any number of creatures grabbed or restrained by it. Each of those creatures can attempt a basic Fortitude save with the listed DC.

ability.name: Siphon Mind

traits.name: Mental
traits.text: A mental effect can alter the target’s mind. It has no effect on an object or a mindless creature.

traits.name: Occult
traits.text:
This magic comes from the occult tradition, calling upon bizarre and ephemeral mysteries. Anything with this trait is magical.  
  
A creature with this trait is primarily constituted of or has a strong connection to occult magic.

ability.requirement: The target creature is grabbed or restrained by Ilakni, is helpless, or is willing, and is adjacent to Ilakni
ability.effect: Ilakni extrudes a seething forest of tendrils from his mouth to wrap around the target's head. These tendrils begin siphoning away the target's mind to make them an empty vessel, ready to be inhabited by Osoyo in the future. The target must attempt a DC 30 Will save.
ability.critical_success: The target is unaffected and is temporarily immune to Siphon Mind for 24 hours.
ability.failure: The target takes 6d6 mental damage and becomes stupefied 1, or increases its stupefied value by 1 to a maximum of stupefied 4. If the creature dies as a result of this mental damage, its body remains alive while its mind and soul move on. The body can remain alive without its soul and mind for many years, as long as it is cared for. If Osoyo escapes from its prison, a body in this state becomes animated by Osoyo's will, transforming into an entity with the same statistics as Ilakni but directly controlled by the Blackfrost Whale. If the body is restored to life before this event, this development can be avoided.
ability.critical_failure: As critical failure, but 12d6 mental damage and stupefied 2 (or increases its stupefied value by 2, to a maximum of 4).
